title: A Job Interview
audioScript: Interviewer: Good morning. Please, take a seat. I've reviewed your resume and I must say your experience is quite impressive. Can you tell me why you want to work for our company? Candidate: Thank you. I've always admired your company's commitment to innovation. I believe my skills in project management would be a great fit for your team. I'm also excited about the opportunity to work on international projects.

exercises.prompt: Dengarkan dan ketik apa yang dikatakan pewawancara tentang pengalaman kandidat.
Dengarkan dan ketik alasan kandidat ingin bekerja di perusahaan tersebut.

title: Making a Restaurant Reservation
audioScript: Receptionist: Good afternoon, Bella Italia Restaurant. How may I help you? Caller: Hi, I'd like to make a reservation for dinner this Saturday. Receptionist: Certainly. For how many people? Caller: For four people, please. And could we get a table by the window? Receptionist: Let me check. Yes, we have a window table available at 7:30 PM. Caller: That sounds perfect. The name is Johnson. Receptionist: Great, Mr. Johnson. We'll see you on Saturday at 7:30.

exercises.prompt: Dengarkan dan ketik hari apa reservasi tersebut dibuat.
exercises.hint_id: Dengarkan hari yang disebutkan oleh pemanggil.

exercises.prompt: Dengarkan dan ketik jam berapa reservasi tersebut.
exercises.hint_id: Dengarkan waktu yang disebutkan oleh resepsionis.

title: Asking for Directions
audioScript: Tourist: Excuse me, could you tell me how to get to the National Museum? Local: Of course! Go straight down this road for about two blocks, then turn left at the traffic lights. You'll see a large park on your right. The museum is just past the park, next to the library. Tourist: Thank you so much! Is it far from here? Local: Not at all. It's about a ten-minute walk. You can't miss it.

exercises.prompt: Dengarkan dan ke arah mana turis harus berbelok.
exercises.hint_id: Dengarkan arah yang disebutkan setelah lampu merah.

exercises.prompt: Dengarkan dan ketik berapa lama waktu tempuh berjalan kaki ke museum.
exercises.hint_id: Penduduk lokal menyebutkan durasi berjalan kaki.

title: A Doctor's Appointment
audioScript: Doctor: Hello, Mrs. Chen. What seems to be the problem today? Patient: Hi, Doctor. I've had a terrible headache for the past three days, and I also feel quite tired. Doctor: I see. Have you been drinking enough water? Patient: Not really. I've been very busy at work. Doctor: That could be the cause. Dehydration often leads to headaches. I recommend drinking at least eight glasses of a day and getting plenty of rest. I'll also prescribe some pain relief medication. Patient: Thank you, Doctor.

exercises.prompt: Dengarkan dan ketik berapa lama pasien sudah mengalami sakit kepala.
Dengarkan dan ketik berapa gelas air yang direkomendasikan dokter per hari.
exercises.hint_id: Dokter menyebutkan jumlah gelas air yang harus diminum.

title: Discussing Weekend Plans
audioScript: Anna: Hey Tom, do you have any plans for the weekend? Tom: Not really. I was thinking about going hiking if the weather is nice. Why? Anna: A few of us are planning to visit the new art exhibition at the City Gallery. Would you like to join us? Tom: That sounds interesting. What time are you going? Anna: We're meeting at 10 AM on Saturday. After the exhibition, we could grab lunch at that new Italian place nearby. Tom: Perfect! Count me in. Should I bring anything? Anna: Just yourself and maybe a camera. The exhibition has some amazing photography.

exercises.prompt: Dengarkan dan ketik aktivitas yang direncanakan Tom jika cuaca bagus.
Dengarkan dan ketik jam berapa mereka akan bertemu pada hari Sabtu.
